headline: Kanye West-Led Festival Loses Another Sponsor
summary: Anheuser-Busch InBev  said it was dropping its sponsorship of a London music festival set to be headlined by  Kanye West,  following other major companies that have pulled out of the planned event.  The company is the latest high-profile sponsor to drop out of Wireless Festival, scheduled to be held this summer in London’s Finsbury Park.  West, who now goes by Ye, was named last week as the marquee performer for the music festival.
